sizing_rule.note: Portfolio divided into 5 equal units; each position sizes to 1 unit (20% of capital). Maximum notional exposure capped at 5x account size; maximum 5 concurrent positions. Uniform risk allocation across portfolio.

source_rule_text: A trader should divide total capital or notional exposure into equal units, then size each position to control no more than one unit of value, ensuring uniform risk allocation across the portfolio.
